title: COMICS ARE GONE
wikitext:
[]: COMICS ARE GONE!             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Dec 21, 2005 11:54 pm OK WHERE ARE MY EVACOMICS!!!!!!! I wanted to see a new evacomic at evacomics.com BUT ITS LIKE AAHHHH not there! its just a ad for web hosting! Did it die?!?! did the creator guy (forgot his name lol) like run out of cash?!? What will i do without my funny spinoff!!!

[]:             Quote Post by sheareraehs » Thu Dec 22, 2005 12:38 am I'll second that. I noticed that they were absent this morning as a did my morning surfing rounds. What Happened? Does anybody know?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Dec 22, 2005 8:40 am Looks like the domain name expired and was not renewed.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Dec 22, 2005 1:57 pm It's back now.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Dec 22, 2005 2:59 pm not for me :*(

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 22, 2005 4:06 pm TheBlueTree wrote: not for me :*(

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Dec 22, 2005 4:08 pm Well, there's no new comic up anyway. Maybe there's some sort of DNS issue taking its good time propagating to you. Have you tried evacomics.com and www.evacomics.com?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Dec 22, 2005 4:23 pm I'm still getting the AD site! Even after reloads! Are you all sure the site is still up?

[]:             Quote Post by Xanatose » Fri Dec 23, 2005 3:13 am The site's coming up just fine for me. I declare this emergency over. You may now rejoice.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 23, 2005 3:18 am AchtungAffen wrote: I'm still getting the AD site! Even after reloads! Are you all sure the site is still up?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Dec 23, 2005 10:35 am Here .

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 23, 2005 3:13 pm AchtungAffen wrote: Here .

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 23, 2005 3:40 pm AchtungAffen is seeing the Omnis placeholder page i.e. the page of the registrar - as seen from whois Domain Name: EVACOMICS.COM Registrar: OMNIS NETWORK, LLC Whois Server: whois.omnis.com Referral URL: http://domains.omnis.com Name Server: NS1.OMNIS.COM Name Server: NS2.OMNIS.COM Status: ACTIVE Updated Date: 22-dec-2005 Creation Date: 06-jul-2002 Expiration Date: 06-jul-2006 I suspect that there is a DNS issue here; but whose cache needs flushing is not clear.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Dec 23, 2005 5:20 pm I just reflushed mine but I'm still getting the same. Probably this comes from my ISP's cache... I don't know.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 23, 2005 6:06 pm Apparently, the site's account got upgraded, and there are still a few issues that will phased out in due time. So don't worry, the site isn't going anywhere anytime soon.

[]: Can you hear me now?             Quote Post by Rhine » Fri Dec 23, 2005 7:24 pm Well, I've gone and updated everything I have access to and can access the site's main page and manager console. Let me know if you're still having problems accessing the site.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Dec 23, 2005 8:58 pm I still get the omni page. Guess then it's at least a local problem with my ISP then.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Dec 27, 2005 12:21 am Yay sites back up for me =D. The new comic is dragging out to much on the porno shop thing :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Dec 27, 2005 2:17 am Yep, back for me too.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Wed Dec 28, 2005 3:42 pm There have been quite a few episodes in the H-shop but I don't mind. :twisted:
